notes: MERGE DECISION: PASS WITH CAVEATS. All acceptance criteria (AC1-AC14) are met. All code deliverables are functional. The only issue is that A1-A4 output JSONs have incorrect commit_shas metadata (they reference the A0 bootstrap commit instead of the actual work commit). This is a metadata-only discrepancy with no impact on code quality or functionality. Recommend merge after PR review.
